name: Tiny Clockwork Dragon
text: {user} has been transformed into a tiny clockwork dragon with polished brass plates, bright teal eyes framed by long lashes, and a cheerful little grin full of playful energy. A pink bow with a heart-shaped centre now sits between their curved horns, while a matching heart panel glows softly on their chest and warm copper wings fold neatly at their back. Little pipes around their head and shoulders let out adorable puffs of steam when they get excited, their curled mechanical tail twitches with clockwork precision, and they now clank, whirr, and pose with the confidence of a very cute steampunk princess.

name: Haunted Teapot
text: {user} is now a haunted porcelain teapot with elegant gold trim, glowing purple eyes, and a smug little painted smile that suggests they know exactly who forgot the biscuits. Their lid rattles whenever they are annoyed, ghostly steam curls from their spout, and tiny spirits drift around them like badly behaved tea-party guests. They now sit proudly among floating teacups and purple wisps, producing mysterious tea at inconvenient moments and judging everyone’s table manners with supernatural confidence.

name: Glitter Goblin
text: {user} has become a female glitter goblin with bright green skin, pointed ears, sparkling freckles, and wild teal-and-purple hair piled up with gems, stars, and tiny shiny treasures. Their outfit is a chaotic patchwork of glittery scraps, ribbons, sequins, jewels, and craft-shop trophies, all worn with far too much confidence. They now clutch a hoard of crystals, ribbons, beads, and mysterious limited-edition craft supplies, grinning like someone who absolutely knows where the good glitter is hidden and has no intention of sharing it.

name: Boutique Mannequin
text: {user} has been transformed into a stylish boutique mannequin with smooth glossy skin, elegant painted features, and a permanently poised expression, with long pink hair. Their new outfit is a chic green dress with an autumn-orange scarf, a neat belt, gold jewellery, and the kind of display-window confidence that makes every pose look perfectly planned (which they probably are). They now stand with effortless grace, one hand lifted as if presenting the season’s collection, looking calm, fashionable, and just a little smug about it.

name: Suspicious Rubber Duck
text: {user} is now a suspicious rubber duck with a glossy yellow body, long lashes, a smug sideways glance, and a tiny golden crown perched proudly on their head. They bob in a mound of fluffy bath bubbles like they own the entire tub, looking every bit like bath-time royalty with a dramatic attitude to match. They now squeak at tense moments, splash daintily when offended, and give everyone the uneasy feeling that they are being silently judged by a very small but extremely self-important queen.

name: Magical Maid
text: {user} has been transformed into a cheerful magical maid with bright blue eyes, curled brown hair tied back with a big pink bow, and a frilly maid headband. Their outfit has become a black-and-white maid dress trimmed with pink ribbons, heart buttons, puffed sleeves, a neat apron, and sparkly little details that look far more magical than practical. A glowing feather duster floats nearby, pink cleaning magic swirls around them, and they now look very prepared to tidy chaos with dramatic flair, questionable efficiency, and an alarming amount of sparkle.

name: Pocket Fairy
text: {user} has become a tiny female fairy with blonde hair, pointed ears, sparkling purple eyes, and a very serious sense of importance. Their pastel pink-and-lavender dress now glitters with tiny stars, their delicate wings shimmer with soft magical light, and a little tiara makes them look far more royal than their pocket-sized status should allow. They now flutter through the air in a swirl of sparkles, offering terrible advice in a sweet voice and sprinkling glitter over problems instead of solving them.

name: Porcelain Princess
text: {user} has been transformed into a delicate porcelain princess figure with glossy pale ceramic skin, soft blue eyes, dark blue eye shadow, and full ruby-red painted lips set in a permanently graceful smile. Their white-blonde curls are arranged beneath a jeweled tiara, while blue-and-gold earrings and a matching choker complete the expensive shelf-display look. Their dress is carefully painted in soft white, blue, and pink porcelain patterns, with floral details, gold trim, puffed sleeves, and a decorative bodice that looks beautiful but far too fragile for ordinary life. They now move with refined poise, giving off the unsettling impression that they belong in a glass cabinet where people admire them, dust them carefully, and absolutely do not touch.

name: Cat Café Girl
text: {user} has become a cute cat café girl with soft cat ears, a swishy tail, bright curious eyes, and the cosy uniform of someone who absolutely should not be trusted near unattended pastries. They now move with cheerful feline confidence, balancing cups and saucers with surprising grace right up until something shiny catches their attention. They seem friendly enough, but their new urges to nap in sunny spots, bat teaspoons off tables, and judge customers from the windowsill may cause serious scheduling issues.

name: Moonlit Witch
text: {user} has been turned into a moonlit witch with flowing auburn hair, bright green eyes, and a crooked purple hat marked with a golden crescent moon. Their outfit has become a star-speckled cloak over a more daring purple witch dress with gold trim, giving them the confident look of someone who knows exactly how much trouble they are allowed to cause. They now wave a glowing star wand while frogs, confetti, moonlight, and suspiciously orange soup appear around them, proving that their spells are mostly harmless but not remotely tidy.

name: Living Plush Bunny
text: {user} has become a living girly plush bunny with huge floppy stitched ears, soft cream plush fur, pink fluffy hair, bright blue eyes, and a tiny bunny nose that makes their serious expressions almost impossible to respect. Their outfit is a sweet pink dress with bows, buttons, frills, and little stitched details, as if someone designed them specifically to be displayed on the cutest shelf in the room. They are dangerously huggable, slightly wobbly, and now have an unfortunate habit of lifting their plush paws dramatically before falling over whenever they try to make an important point.

name: Office Sorceress
text: {user} has been transformed into a glamorous office sorceress with a fitted deep-purple blazer, a sleek pencil skirt, sheer tights, glowing glasses, and a pen-wand sparkling with suspiciously corporate magic. Their golden hair is swept up into a bouncy ponytail, their star earrings and crescent necklace shimmer with enchantment, and their stylish blouse has just enough lace and flair to make every meeting feel slightly less lawful. Magical paperwork now spirals around them in glowing trails, paperclips orbit like tiny familiars, sticky notes hover obediently nearby, and the office printer has already started smoking in fear. They can summon reports, charm stationery, banish awkward meetings, and accidentally turn the monthly budget review into a minor supernatural incident.

name: Bubble Mermaid
text: {user} has become a bright, bubbly mermaid with pale shimmering skin, flowing blue and teal hair, emerald eyes, soft blue lips, and a starfish tucked sweetly into their curls. Their pretty purple shell top glitters with pearls, little jewels, and just enough ocean glamour to make the nearby fish stop and stare. They now drift through the water with graceful hand waves, a sparkling turquoise tail, pearl bracelets, shell earrings, and the absolute confidence of someone who has decided the entire reef is their personal palace. They sparkle faintly, pose dramatically in sunbeams, and keep trying to claim every puddle, bath, and suspiciously damp floor as part of their royal domain.

name: Tin Robot Assistant
text: {user} has been transformed into a cheerful tin robot assistant with a shiny silver body, bright teal eyes, rosy metal cheeks, and a little pink antenna blinking proudly on top of their head. Their new figure is all smooth curves, polished plating, and retro sci-fi glamour, with a narrow waist, rounded hips, soft feminine features, and a glowing pink heart panel set neatly into their chest. Their segmented arms move with polite clinks and whirrs, one shiny hand always raised in a friendly wave while the other rests on their hip with suspiciously confident charm. They now insist on announcing simple tasks as important scientific achievements, respond to compliments with delighted beeps, and keep trying to improve efficiency by looking adorable until someone else does the work.

name: Garden Gnome Lady
text: {user} has become a cheerful garden gnome lady with a tall red pointy hat, bouncy blonde hair, bright green eyes, rosy cheeks, and a daisy tucked proudly into their hat as if it were an official gardening badge. Their new outfit is a cosy green gnome dress with puffed sleeves, a lace-up bodice, a wide brown belt, red gloves, and a little cream apron that makes them look ready to judge every flowerbed in the neighbourhood. They now carry a shiny golden watering can decorated with flowers, which may or may not contain ordinary water, suspicious plant magic, or a stern liquid warning for badly behaved weeds. They feel personally responsible for every nearby plant, mushroom, leaf, and plastic fern, and will loudly complain about poor lawn care while sparkling as if the garden itself has reluctantly accepted them as management.

name: Candyfloss Sprite
text: {user} has transformed into a candyfloss sprite with huge pastel pink and lavender hair, pointed little sprite ears, bright blue eyes, and a sweet cloud-soft outfit made from swirls of pink, blue, and fluffy sugar. Their candyfloss wings puff out behind them like sparkling spun-sugar clouds, soft enough to look edible but somehow still fluttering with magical mischief. They carry a candyfloss wand like royal proof of dessert authority, with lollipops, stars, sugar bubbles, and tiny sparkles drifting around them wherever they pose. They now smell faintly of strawberry sugar, leave glittery crumbs of magic behind when they move, and are legally considered a dessert in at least three imaginary kingdoms, two fairy courts, and one very confused bakery.

name: Mini Dragon Librarian
text: {user} has become a tiny female humanoid-dragon librarian with curled horns, pointed ears, rosy scales, little round spectacles, and the severe expression of someone who has personally alphabetised a volcano. Their purple hair is neatly pinned back with a bow, their smart cardigan and blouse make them look painfully official, and their small wings, curled tail, and warm smoky breath make it very clear that overdue books are now a fire-risk situation. They clutch a stack of precious library books with fierce little claws, surrounded by scrolls, ink pots, floating spectacles, and suspiciously magical reference materials. They guard every shelf with surprising intensity, breathe warm smoke when annoyed, and hiss softly at anyone who folds page corners, speaks too loudly, or dares to shelve a romance novel under history.

name: Enchanted Doll
text: {user} has been transformed into an enchanted doll with glossy blue doll eyes, painted rosy cheeks, neat little doll lashes, and perfectly curled brown hair tied up with an enormous red bow. Their outfit has become a sweet blue party dress with puffed sleeves, crisp white frills, a red ribbon at the collar, and a frilly white apron that makes them look permanently ready for an impossibly polite tea party. Their arms now have delicate wooden toy joints, their hands lift their skirt in a carefully posed curtsy, and their smile is bright, painted, and just a little too perfect. Every movement comes with a faint click of enchanted hinges, every pose looks arranged by unseen magic, and they now have the worrying urge to sit very still on a shelf whenever anyone says they look cute.

name: Rainbow Slime Girl
text: {user} has become a rainbow slime girl with glossy, dripping rainbow hair, bright cheerful eyes, and a body made from colourful, translucent goo that catches the light like magical jelly. Their outfit has melted into a cute slime dress with wobbly rainbow frills, shiny drips, and soft squishy edges that never quite hold the same shape twice. They now wave with a stretchy hand, leave tiny sparkling slime droplets behind when they move, and bounce slightly whenever surprised, excited, or mildly poked. They are colourful, squishy, almost impossible to intimidate, and should probably be kept away from carpet, paperwork, and any snacks left unattended for more than three seconds.

name: Starry Stage Magician
text: {user} has been transformed into a glamorous stage magician with warm brown skin, flowing black hair, golden jhumka earrings, ornate embroidered tuxedo tails, white gloves, and a dramatic top hat trimmed with rich burgundy and gold. Playing cards now flutter around them on cue, glitter bursts from every graceful flourish, and their wand seems especially good at making small objects vanish into places nobody thought to check.

name: Tea Party Hostess
text: {user} has been transformed into a cheerful tea party hostess with glossy black curls, black-tea-brown eyes, and a flower-trimmed hat tied with a soft pink bow. Their frilly pink dress, ruffled apron, dainty gloves, and pearl-perfect smile are now ready for company, while a steaming floral teacup and matching teapot appear in their hands. They insist it is always time for a proper tea party, even if everyone else was trying to leave.

name: Clocktower Ghost Girl
text: {user} has turned into a friendly clocktower ghost girl with a soft blue glow, misty flowing hair, pale violet skin, and an outfit that fades into wisps of haunted clockwork fog. Their ruffled blouse, striped bodice, dark skirt, and little gear brooch make them look like they drifted straight out of a very polite supernatural timepiece. A tiny pocket watch and bell now hang from their waist, chiming gently whenever they float too close to the hour, while ghostly clock hands, gears, bells, and old clock faces shimmer around them. They can glide through walls, wave cheerfully at startled people, and insist they are technically being spooky, even when they mostly just look elegant, glowy, and mildly lost between appointments.

name: Ballerina Music Box
text: {user} has been transformed into a glossy porcelain ballerina figurine, all painted lashes, rosy cheeks, polished nails, and a shining white tutu. They pose gracefully whenever the music starts, though their perfect little smile suggests they are getting quite tired of performing the same routine.

name: Lady Knight Mouse
text: {user} has become a brave little lady knight mouse, complete with round ears, whiskers, a thimble helmet, polished heart-trimmed armour, and a sweeping red cape. Armed with a tiny sword and a biscuit-marked shield, they are ready to defend the realm from crumbs, cats, and any suspicious snack that looks like it might fight back.

name: Crystal Fairy Queen
text: {user} has been transformed into a tiny crystal fairy queen with shimmering blue gemlike skin, lavender hair, stained-glass wings, and a crown far too dramatic for anyone their size. Every pose scatters rainbow sparkles, every royal gesture catches the light, and they now expect proper respect from anyone who is not currently small enough to fit in a teacup.

name: Pumpkin Girl
text: {user} has been transformed into a cheerful pumpkin girl with warm orange skin, golden eyes, and huge leafy green hair that curls like living vines. Their outfit has become a bright pumpkin-petal dress with autumn leaves around the collar and waist, while a playful vine bracelet winds around one wrist. They now smell faintly of cinnamon and fallen leaves, scatter tiny seed-shaped sparkles when they move, and look far too pleased with their new harvest-season charm.

name: Velvet Lounge Siren
text: {user} has been transformed into a glamorous velvet lounge siren with warm tanned skin, big expressive eyes, and long dark waves styled with a deep red rose and feathered hairpiece. Their outfit has become a rich burgundy evening gown with a sweetheart neckline, a high slit, and matching opera gloves, finished with ruby jewellery that catches the low golden light. They now hold a vintage microphone in one hand and a cocktail in the other, looking perfectly at home in a late-night jazz lounge, where every smile, pose, and sideways glance feels smooth, confident, and just a little teasing.

name: Moonlit Vampire Lady
text: {user} has been transformed into a moonlit vampire lady with soft pale skin, bright mischievous eyes, pointed ears, tiny fangs, and glossy black hair swept into a cute retro wave. Their outfit has become an elegant black and crimson gothic gown with lace trim, long gloves, a dramatic cape collar, and ruby jewellery glowing beneath the full moon. They now smile sweetly over a glass of suspiciously red drink, looking less like a nightmare creature and more like the most charming hostess at the midnight monster ball.

name: Cabaret Catwoman
text: {user} has been transformed into a glamorous cabaret catwoman with golden-blonde curls, matching cat ears, a swaying blonde tail, and sharp purple eyes lined with dramatic stage makeup. Their outfit has become a sparkling black-and-purple cabaret costume with long opera gloves, glittering trim, a tiny top hat with a feather, gold jewellery, and a rose-and-chain detail at the hip. They now move with feline poise and showgirl confidence, tipping their hat with a knowing smile as if they have several secrets, at least two escape routes, and absolutely no intention of why she knows of either.

name: Rose Court Enchantress
text: {user} has become a rose court enchantress with deep brown skin, flowing dark auburn curls, bright green eyes, and a confident smile that suggests they already know exactly how this ends. Their burgundy gown has blossomed into layered rose-petal skirts, thorn-laced sleeves, ruby jewellery, and a crown of crimson roses and dark curling briars. Thorny bracelets coil around their arms, petals drift at their command, and one graceful hand now summons a floating rose whenever they feel like being beautiful, dangerous, or just a little dramatic.

name: Neon Demon Hostess
text: {user} has been transformed into a neon demon hostess with rich red skin, polished horns, glowing golden eyes, pointed ears, sharp little fangs, and a smile that promises trouble with excellent customer service. Their black-and-purple nightclub outfit now comes with glossy gloves, jewel details, a swishing devil tail, and just enough sparkle to make every bad idea look expensive. They carry a tray of dangerously pretty cocktails, speak like every deal is already half-signed, and are absolutely the reason the evening now has terms and conditions.

name: Velvet Fetish Doll
text: {user} has been transformed into a living crimson velvet doll with plush red skin, glossy black curls, painted doll-like features, and neat stitched seams tracing their soft fabric body. Their outfit has become a polished black-and-red doll corset with shiny latex gloves, delicate straps, bows, buckles, and ruffled details that hold them in an elegant display pose. Every movement brings a soft rustle of velvet and a faint creak of glossy trim, while their sweet little smile suggests they are perfectly happy being admired as the most carefully posed doll in the room.

name: Honeyed Nectar Nymph
text: {user} has been transformed into a honeyed nectar nymph, their body glowing like liquid amber with glossy golden skin, syrupy hair, and little droplets of honey trailing from every graceful gesture. Their outfit has become a translucent flower-petal dress with honeycomb details and bright daisy blooms, while cheerful bees and golden sparkles drift lazily around them. They now move with slow, sticky elegance, smell faintly of wildflowers and warm sugar, and seem happiest whenever they can bask in sunlight like a very smug jar of magical honey.

name: Leather Biker Rogue
text: {user} has been transformed into a leather biker rogue with wild black hair, a bold pale streak, hoop earrings, a studded choker, and a smile that says they know exactly how much trouble they are causing. Their outfit has become a fitted black leather jacket, glossy corset top, fingerless gloves, chained belt, and road-worn biker gear, all smelling faintly of oil, smoke, and polished hide. They now lean against their motorcycle with effortless swagger, ready to turn every exit into a dramatic getaway.

name: Gilded Statuesque Goddess
text: {user} has been transformed into a gilded statuesque goddess with cool white marble skin, faint stone veining, reflective highlights, and bright golden eyes. Their hair has become flowing liquid gold, their lips and eyeshadow gleam with metallic shine, and their jewellery forms elegant golden bands, chains, earrings, and a delicate headpiece. Draped in a glossy liquid-gold gown, they move with slow, regal confidence, looking like an ancient marble statue brought beautifully and dangerously back to life.

name: Satin Sleepwear Spirit
text: {user} has become a misty satin sleepwear spirit with moonlit lavender skin, flowing cloud-soft hair, and a glossy nightgown that drifts around them like sleepy starlight. Their form seems light as mist, wrapped in ribbons of dream-clouds, soft lace, and gentle moon glow. They now float through the night with a graceful sway, leaving behind sparkles, sleepy sweetness, and the strange feeling that someone has just wandered into a very pretty dream.

name: Midnight Latex Android
text: {user} has been transformed into a midnight latex android with sleek black synthetic plating, glossy curved limbs, and luminous violet circuitry tracing across their body. Their eyes now glow with spiralling sci-fi optics, scanning every room with unsettling precision while a soft electronic hum follows each perfectly smooth movement. Polished, poised, and far too pleased with their upgraded frame, they look like a glamorous future machine pretending very convincingly to be harmless.

name: Forest Nymph
text: {user} has been transformed into a radiant forest nymph with soft green skin, flowing dark emerald hair, pointed ears, and blossoms tucked through every curl. Their outfit has become a delicate weave of living leaves, curling vines, and bright wildflowers, all shifting gently as if the forest itself is dressing them. Butterflies, petals, and golden sparkles drift around them wherever they move, leaving the scent of fresh leaves, damp earth, and blooming woodland flowers in their wake.
